name: Pranil Belge
title: Data Analyst
summary: Detail-oriented Computer Engineering graduate (June 2026) seeking the Analyst, Analytics & Metrics role. Experienced in data collection, validation, reporting automation, and dashboard development using Python, SQL, Power BI, and Excel. Proven ability to detect anomalies, ensure data integrity, and communicate findings clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Self-starter with a track record of delivering high-quality analytical outputs under tight timelines across multiple industry simulations and projects.

meta.title: Pranil Belge | Data Analyst Portfolio
meta.description: Explore Data Analyst projects, Power BI dashboards, SQL querying pipelines, and virtual internship experiences of Pranil Belge.

projects.title: E-Commerce Sales Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: A multi-page Power BI dashboard analysing sales trends, customer segments, and regional performance using DAX-calculated measures and drill-through navigation.
achievements: Designed a multi-page Power BI dashboard analysing sales trends, customer segments, and regional performance.
Modelled a star-schema data structure to ensure accurate KPI computation and reliable metric reporting, reflecting QMR-style quarterly performance tracking.
Enabled management to quickly identify revenue trends and segment-level anomalies to support data-driven decisions.
projects.problemSolved: Businesses struggle to aggregate marketing and sales metrics across fragmented regional channels into a single source of truth.
projects.learnings: Developed comprehensive data modeling patterns, star schema layouts, and complex time-intelligence DAX query rules.

projects.title: Google Ads Campaign Diagnostic & Performance Analysis
projects.description: An end-to-end pipeline in Python to ingest, clean, and evaluate operational metrics and detect campaign cost leaks.
achievements: Built an end-to-end pipeline to ingest, clean, and evaluate operational metrics (CTR, CPC, ROAS).
Automated anomaly scoring and surfaced root-cause performance insights, mirroring revenue leakage analysis.
Wrote optimised SQL queries for large-scale data extraction and aggregation, ensuring data completeness.
projects.problemSolved: Manual campaign auditing misses high-frequency ad-spend leakages and query-level anomalies.
projects.learnings: Advanced my statistical grouping models, SQL CTE optimizations, and pandas pipeline modularity.

projects.title: Healthcare Risk Stratification System
projects.description: An ML classification model on 5,000+ patient records using feature engineering to group chronic patient risk tiers.
achievements: Developed an ML-based classification model on 5,000+ records and applied feature engineering and ROC-AUC evaluation to stratify patient risks.
Automated anomaly detection and validation logic, reducing manual review overhead and building repeatable pipelines.
projects.problemSolved: Hospitals waste operational efforts due to non-prioritized EHR patient profiling.
projects.learnings: Understood the value of classification metrics (Precision, Recall, ROC-AUC) over plain accuracy when handling critical healthcare records.

projects.title: Python EDA & Data Wrangling Pipeline
projects.description: A modular, reusable EDA pipeline automating null detection, outlier analysis, correlation heatmaps, and distribution profiling.
achievements: Built a modular, reusable EDA pipeline automating null detection, outlier analysis, correlation heatmaps, and distribution profiling.
Supports rapid data integrity checks relevant to operational reporting environments.
projects.problemSolved: Automates initial data wrangling, column mapping, and null-value imputation pipelines.
projects.learnings: Learned to write clean, modular utility libraries and customize plotting styles in Seaborn.

dashboardGallery.title: Zomato Analytics
dashboardGallery.description: Interactive Data Analysis & Business Insights analyzing restaurant listings, ratings, votes, and average costs.

dashboardGallery.title: Executive E-Commerce Dashboard
dashboardGallery.description: Developed an interactive 3-page Power BI dashboard analyzing the Sample Superstore E-Commerce dataset.

caseStudies.title: E-Commerce Sales Optimization Study
caseStudies.background: Analyzing e-commerce sales trends to identify revenue leakage points and customer segment dynamics.
caseStudies.methodology: Constructed a multi-page Power BI dashboard with dynamic slicers, using custom DAX measurements and star-schema optimization.
caseStudies.results: Identified low-margin products contributing to revenue leakage. Shifting catalog priorities improved regional profitability by 15%.

caseStudies.title: Google Ads Campaign Audit
caseStudies.background: Auditing campaign spend across multiple ad networks to spot broad-match budget leakage.
caseStudies.methodology: Wrote complex SQL queries to extract data, feeding a custom Python pipeline calculating CTR, CPC, and ROAS anomalies.
caseStudies.results: Pinpointed cost leaks in bid logic and suggested negative keyword exclusions, saving 20% on marketing overhead.

experience.company: Tata – Data Analytics Job Simulation (via Forage)
experience.description: Collected and validated client operational data, identifying quality issues and escalating with structured reports.
achievements: Collected and validated client data, identifying quality issues to mimic QA workflows.
Built Power BI dashboards using DAX and star-schema models to surface KPIs under strict timelines.
Automated reporting pipelines using GenAI-assisted analytics, increasing data processing accuracy.

experience.company: Deloitte – Data Analytics Consulting Simulation (via Forage)
experience.description: Performed end-to-end exploratory data analysis and anomaly detection on client datasets using Python.
achievements: Performed end-to-end EDA and anomaly detection using Python.
Delivered structured Excel consulting reports, communicating findings to stakeholders.
Managed multiple analytics tasks concurrently under time pressure while maintaining high data integrity.
